items.title: EU Targets Amazon and Microsoft in Explosive Cloud Crackdown
items.description: Brussels launches sweeping probe into AWS and Azure after back-to-back outages rattle confidence in Big Tech's cloud dominance.

items.title: Trump touts steps to make life more affordable, but many struggle to afford fast food
items.description: There is a bifurcation in the American economy between higher- and lower-income consumers. The latter are being left behind.

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway: Buffett Sticks To His Guns, Dismiss His Warning At Your Own Peril
items.description: Discover key insights from Buffett's Q3 13F report, focusing on his strategic stock sales and cautionary moves.

items.title: Trump ramps up affordability push, telling fretful Americans that inflation is ‘almost at the sweet spot’
items.description: President Trump is stepping up his effort to try to counteract the unease Americans feel with rising prices and his own handling of the issue.
